creator: mallocbsd@foxmail.com
text:
(In reply to Dirk Meyer from comment #5)
> the codepath of your patch is not touched here.
> 
> could you unmount your /proc filesystem and try again?

Oops, graphviz works fine as soon as /proc gone away. Many thanks.
I don't know this would affect.

My desktop environment was LXDE, then KDE. The /proc entry exists in my /etc/fstab for quite a while. Time to remove it.
